TITLE: SMTP to MQTT Bridge
SUBTITLE: Convert IP camera email alerts into MQTT messages and triggers
HELP_SMTP_PORT: Port on which the built-in SMTP server listens (default: 1025). Cameras send emails to this port.
HELP_BIND_HOST: 0.0.0.0 = All network interfaces (recommended for camera access), 127.0.0.1 = Localhost only.
HELP_WEB_PORT: Port for built-in status interface and JSON API.
HELP_ALLOWED_IPS: Comma-separated list of allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24, 10.0.0.5). Leave empty or '*' to allow all IPs.
WARN_ALLOWED_IPS_ALL: ⚠️ Warning: '*' or empty field specified. SMTP server will accept emails from any IP address on the network.
HELP_MQTT_RESET_TIME: Seconds after which status resets back (0 = no auto-reset).
HELP_TITLE: How to use smtp2mqtt in LoxBerry
HELP_INTRO: The smtp2mqtt plugin operates as a lightweight SMTP server that captures motion detection email alerts from IP cameras and instantly converts them into MQTT messages and triggers for Loxone / Smart Home.
HELP_CAM_TITLE: 🎥 IP Camera Setup Guide (Hikvision, Dahua, Reolink, Axis)
HELP_CAM_STEP1: 1. Open your IP camera's web interface in Network -> Email.
HELP_CAM_STEP2: 2. SMTP Server: Enter your LoxBerry's IP address (e.g., 192.168.1.100).
HELP_CAM_STEP3: 3. SMTP Port: Enter the configured SMTP port (default: 1025).
HELP_CAM_STEP4: 4. Authentication / SSL / TLS: Disable SSL/TLS and authentication.
HELP_CAM_STEP5: 5. Sender: Enter camera identifier, e.g., garden.camera@home.local. This address automatically creates MQTT topic: smtp2mqtt/garden_camera-home_local.
HELP_LOXONE_DESC: In Loxone Config, add MQTT Text In Subscriptions for topic smtp2mqtt/#. Example: smtp2mqtt/garden_camera-home_local changes to ON when motion is detected and returns to OFF after 10 seconds.
HELP_SEC_DESC: Never expose the SMTP service directly to the public internet without a VPN. To prevent spam on your local network, use the ALLOWED_IPS field to restrict access exclusively to your camera IP addresses.
DASH_NO_DATA_DESC: The smtp2mqtt service has not been started yet or has not written its status file. Click 'Start Service' to activate.
DASH_UPDATE_AVAILABLE: A new plugin version is available!
DASH_NO_EVENTS: No events have been recorded yet.
